channel.title: Home Page on Zach DiNucci
channel.description: Recent content in Home Page on Zach DiNucci

item.title: BOISE SCHOOLS AR
item.description: AR Demo UNITY AUGMENTED REALITY APP/ Spring 2021 About this Game Augmented Reality is a newer technology that hopefully will improve the lives of those who use it. This app is to help teach people how to interact in a society. It has three lessons using AR and 1 using an animated video. The three lessons are; how to ride the bus, keep a safe distance, and order food at a restaurant.

item.title: Contact Me
item.description: Enjoyed what you saw? Have any Questions? Contact Me! MESSAGE LinkedIn PHONE (208)867-2670 EMAIL zdinucci@gmail.com Send Message Other Developers and Designers JOHN KISER Developer & Musician CHRIS DAHRENS Developer & 3D Artist

item.title: EXPERIENCE
item.description: Work Experience BEST DAY HR 2019 - CURRENT I build tools and programs using .NET Core, C#, SQL, and JavaScript and utilize MS Azure to host the programs. Here I have worked with OOP r to develop web applications that local municipalities use to run their HR operations and make things easy for every employee to use. It has helped me learn new coding practices, such as being more efficient with my code and making sure the site is accessible for those with disabilities.

item.title: Food Flingers
item.description: Food Flingers UNITY VIRTUAL REALITY FIRST PERSON SHOOTER/ Spring 2021 About this Game Today East Middle School holds its annual food fight. You and your classmates will battle in the cafeteria in order to see who is the last standing in a best of 3 team deathmatch. Use food to hit the other team to knock them out. Use water to clean your team and help them last longer. In this VR FPS, you are the deciding factor of who wins and losses.

item.title: Games
item.description: ALL GAMES VIRTUAL REALITY AUGMENTED REALITY CURRENT PROJECT PORTFOLIO FPS Demo UNITY FIRST PERSON SHOOTER Third Person Demo UNITY FIRST PERSON SHOOTER ROBO BEATDOWN UNREAL ENGINE VIDEO GAME FOOD FLINGERS UNITY VR GAME PIG UNITY VIDEO GAME QUACK ATTACK UNREAL ENGINE VIDEO GAME MULTIPLAYER BOMBERS UNITY MULTIPLAYER VIDEO GAME AR BOISE SCHOOLS UNITY AUGMENTED REALITY APP

item.title: Home
item.description: Hello, my name is Zachary DiNucci I am a Game Developer with a bachelor's degree from Boise State's College of Innovation and Design through their Games Interactive Media and Mobile Technology (GIMM) program and an associate's degree in History. You will find examples of single-player, multiplayer, AR, and VR games in Unity and Unreal Engine. These games are a mixture of solo and group projects primarily done in the last two years, and some can be found on Itch.

item.title: Multiplayer Bomber
item.description: Multiplayer Bomber UNITY MULTIPLAYER GAME/ Fall 2020 About this Game Choose your side. Are you easy to maneuver but hard to aim air crafts or the hard to move but powerful AA cannon? This multiplayer fight is one v three as we see how can win and if numbers can overcome or will power win. About the Development Multiplayer Bomber was the third game created with the group that created PIG and Quack Attack.

item.title: PIG
item.description: PIG UNITY TOP DOWN GAME/ Fall 2020 About this Game Life in the countryside is normally pretty easy. Today is the exception. The crops need planting, but the local boar population has exploded. Defend your corn from these pests, and deposit it in the carts. Watch out though, the boars will defend themselves, and some have sharp tusks. About the Development PIG was a group project in one of my GIMM classes.

item.title: QUACK ATTACK
item.description: Quack Attack UNREAL ENGINE FIRST PERSON SHOOTER/ Fall 2020 About this Game Ahh the fair, a place where fun and games are a few dollars away. Welcome to Quack Attack the latest game here at our fabulous Fair. The goal is simple, you have 60 seconds to hit as many of the targets with your pellet gun. Can you get the High Score? About the Development Quack Attack was created in the same group as PIG and Multiplayer Bomber.

item.title: ROBO BEATDOWN
item.description: Robo Beatdown UNREAL ENGINE TOP DOWN SHOOTER/ Spring 2021 About this Game Escape a secret government facility responsible for researching and creating government warbots like yourself. Fight through the waves of bots to earn your freedom and escape. In this top-down shooter, you will fight through 10 waves with ever-increasing difficulty on two different levels. While the early bots might be easy, their numbers can become overwhelming, especially later. Be sure to continue to top off your health as the waves continue, or else you might get stuck in a side room hoping the bots don’t break-in.

item.title: ROBO BEATDOWN
item.description: Test FPS UNITY FIRST PERSON SHOOTER/Summer/Fall 2022 About this Game This game is currently work in progress. It is meant to be an arena FPS game reliant on fast movement and aim. It utilizes PUN 2.0 for multiplayer networking. Currently the player can join, swap weapons, shoot, reload, and kill whoever else joins. Most of the art is temporary right now but the Gun assets come from a Polygon asset pack.

item.title: ROBO BEATDOWN
item.description: Demo Third Person Shooter UNITY THIRD PERSON SHOOTER/Spring/Summer 2022 About this Game This was a demo I created to test some of the newer Unity 3d Systems which had come out since I started developing in Unity. I created this Third Person Shooter to learn Cinamachines, Unity’s animation systems, and some Gun Logic which I hadn’t learned yet. While I don’t plan to come back to this project, I do want to use the animation knowledge in the current First Person Shooter I am working on for the reloading, movement system, and some other small things.

item.title: ZACHARY DINUCCI
item.description: ABOUT ME! My name is Zach DiNucci; I am a junior developer, a game designer, a history buff, and a gamer. I grew up in Boise, Idaho, attending Boise State University. I expanded my knowledge and built some of my first games through a new program at Boise State called GIMM. Along with attending classes, I joined a Dungeons and Broncos club, where I became a dungeon master and player.
